case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS RAMIREZ ENGINEERING CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ ENGINEERING CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ ENGINEERING CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ ENGINEERING CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
